notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Brewers challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Jackson Chourio steals (4) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Chourio steals (5) 2nd base. Jackson Chourio to 3rd. Jackson Chourio advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Pedro Pagés.
